chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 3867 of 2019 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of Misc. No.17224/2019 2. For hearing of main case 20.05.2025 Mr. Ali Mahdi, advocate for the petitioner Mr. Tanzeel Farooqui, advocate for respondent Ms. Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General Mr. Muhammad Akbar Khan, Assistant Attorney General It is jointly submitted that this petition is covered by a judgment in the case of M/s. Millennium Mall Management Co. vs. Pakistan and others reported as SBLR 2024 Sindh 1059, hence, this petition may be disposed of on the same reasons and upon the same terms. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Amjad
